zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Markham于1612年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾蓋斯波洛时，她的父亲William Markham33岁，母亲Sarah Ashley33岁。她于大约1644年与Samuel Vawdrey在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Markham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Markham Clinton or East Markham (Nottinghamshire). The placename derives from Old English mearc ‘mark, boundary’ + hām ‘village, homestead’ or hamm ‘water meadow’.

Irish: English surname used as an equivalent of Gaelic Ó Marcacháin ‘descendant of Marcachán’, a diminutive of Marcach ‘horseman, rider’ (see Markey ). This was originally a Galway surname but is now found mainly in Clare, sometimes translated into English as Ryder .

variants.name: Markey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Donal, Donovan, Fergal.
Irish (Monaghan): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Marcaigh ‘descendant of Marcach’, a name meaning ‘horseman, knight’, from marc ‘horse’. Compare Markham 2.
English: apparently from a placename meaning ‘boundary river’ in Old or Middle English, but no such place has been identified.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
meanings: A name corrpted from Hannah, q.v. It is also found several times in a male name. From Ann, Anne, we have as nicknames Nan and Nancy

variants.name: Nancy
meanings: Of uncertain origin. From the 18th century it is clearly used as a pet form of   Ann   (  see  Nan  ), but it may originally have been a similar formation deriving from the common medieval given name   Annis  , a vernacular form of   Agnes .  Nowadays it is an independent name, and was especially popular in America in the 1930s, 40s, and 50s.

variants.name: Nan
meanings: Originally a pet form of Ann (for the initial N-, compare Ned ). It is now also widely used as a short form of Nancy .

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Markham was born in 1612, in Gainsborough, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Markham, was 33 and her mother, Sarah Ashley, was 33. She married Samuel Vawdrey about 1644, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Markham est née en 1612, à Gainsborough, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Markham, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Sarah Ashley, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Samuel Vawdrey environ 1644, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Markham 1612 in Gainsborough, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Markham 33 und ihre Mutter Sarah Ashley 33. Sie hat um 1644 in England, United Kingdom Samuel Vawdrey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Markham è nata il nel 1612 nel Gainsborough, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William Markham, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Sarah Ashley, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Samuel Vawdrey circa 1644, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia.

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Markham(이)가 1612년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 게인스버루그h에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Markham(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sarah Ashley(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 대략 1644년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Samuel Vawdrey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.
